title: Demoniac
writer: Pierre Boileau, Thomas Narcejac, Luis Saslavsky
actors: François Périer, Micheline Presle, Jeanne Moreau
plot: Gervais and his friend Bernard, two prisoners of war, manage to escape from the camp where they are held. Bernard is determined to take refuge with Hélène, his war grandmother, a woman with whom he has been carrying on a romance b...
